## Decision
REFINE

## Justification
The decision to REFINE is based on several methodological shortcomings identified in the analysis. While the innovative strategies show promise, the lack of variability, insufficient sample size, and narrow focus on metrics undermine the robustness and reliability of the findings. The analysis quality rating of 4/10 further indicates that improvements are necessary to meet the minimum quality criteria for proceeding to paper writing.
